creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Gert, thank you for your report. 

A reduced test case/program would be certainly by ideal, but also the following information would be useful if you can provide it:

- Exact freebsd versions affected (uname -a)
- Minimum network configuration necessary to reproduce (/etc/rc.conf, openvpn or pure tun/tap config (ideally))
- truss or similar trace output under reproduction (as an attachment)
- /var/run/dmesg.boot output (as an attachment)
- confirmation whether openvpn/openvpn-devel from ports/packages also exhibits this issue.

Additionally, we've had many changes in current since 12 was branched, I'd probably test a 13-CURRENT snapshot too (the issue may have been identified and resolved)

^Triage:  cc net/openvpn maintainer
